title: sesamum indicum subsp. malabaricum
intro: Sesamum indicum subsp. malabaricum, also known as Malabar sesame, is a subspecies of the sesame plant, belonging to the family Pedaliaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The Malabar sesame offers various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression, and supporting liver health. The herbal preparations of Sesamum indicum subsp. malabaricum include oil extraction, tea, and capsule or tablet forms, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
